bead.title: Migrate service.go claude consumers to QuotaHarness/AccountHarness interface
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05B
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. service.go drops the claudeharness import
2. Every claude-related call in service.go fetches the runner via harnessByName, type-asserts to the sub-interface, and projects through service_projection helpers
3. go test ./... passes; BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures pass structural diff for claude rows
